Subject: A few things...

Hi <firstname>

Last week I mentioned my "thank you" plan - how I wanted
to do something special to thank my readers for that huge
outpouring of love and well-wishes for Abbie and Jonathan
as they are about to get married.

Well, it took a little longer than expected to pull this
plan together...

HOWEVER, it is finally just about ready to go...

I have put together a huge bundle of just about everything
I have ever done that puts more love, romance, and passion
into your life. And then I completely slashed the price
for you - by more than half.

This really is the "Mother Of All Offers" from the Mother
Of The Bride. 

And it will be ready tomorrow - Friday, September 30th at
10:00am eastern time. 

I am putting the finishing touches on right now... I will
send you an email tomorrow to tell you where to get it -
look for that email just before 10:00am eastern.

     (My apologies to those folks on the west
     coast who will have to get up early - it will
     be worth it!) 

One other thing... there are some special bonuses for the
first 50 people who take advantage of this offer - so be
sure to look out for my email.

On a related note, many people were wondering when the
wedding is - it is a little over a week away, on October
8th. Which means I have all kinds of last minute details to
worry about (that is the reason that my "Mother Of All
Offers" is only available until October 6th).

That's it for now - watch for my email tomorrow morning...
you don't want to miss out on the "early bird" bonuses.


warmly,
Leslie

P.S.> The love notes and well-wishes for Abbie and
Jonathan are still pouring in. You can see them at this
link: http://goromance.com/abbie
